significance¶

Summary¶

keyword default attribute value
bar_linewidth None    
    unique True
       
box_linewidth 0.5    
    unique True
       
color None    
    optional True
    unique True
       
rescale False    
    unique True
       
type bar    
    unique True
    validate ValidateChoice
      box
      bar
      none
       

Keywords¶

bar_linewidth¶

default: None

line width for bars, if null the width of the curve line width is used

attribute value
unique True

box_linewidth¶

default: 0.5

line width for boxes

attribute value
unique True

color¶

default: None

color of the bar or box. If not set, the color of the curve color is used

attribute value
optional True
unique True

rescale¶

default: False

the plot is scaled using the values of the curves. If set to True, the values of the significance are also used to scale the Y axis, ensuring that the significance boxes or bars are visible

attribute value
unique True

type¶

default: bar

none: no significance displayed, bar: error bars are used, box: boxes on the reference curve are displayed

attribute value
unique True
validate ValidateChoice
  box
  bar
  none
